revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from film
  |name=From a film
  |from=a film title that is a subtopic of the redirect target or a title in an alternative language that has been produced in that language{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|noitalic||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template index/Redirect pages||{{italic title}}}}}}
  |main category=Redirects from films
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from film |name=From a film |from=a film title that is a subtopic of the redirect target or a title in an alternative language that has been produced in that language{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|noitalic||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template index/Redirect pages||{{italic title}}}}}} |main category=Redirects from films }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from film |name=From a film |from=a film title that is a subtopic of the redirect target or a title in an alternative language that has been produced in that language{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|noitalic||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template index/Redirect pages||{{italic title}}}}}} |main category=Redirects from films }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
